{{Quote|What kind of pirates are you? Your organization is far too rigid. My group is a ''brotherhood'', not a group of slaves under some backstabbing Nalroni who'd probably jet you out the airlock for a measly 50 creds.|[[Safonne Pendon]], to [[Denuab Venithon|Denuab]] and [[Dorin Venithon]]|<ref name="Alliance Intelligence Reports">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>}}
The '''Hy'thor Group''' was a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] organization operating in [[Mieru'kar sector/Legends|Mieru'kar sector]] during the [[Rebellion era]], led by the [[Nalroni/Legends|Nalroni]] criminal [[Ompiach]]. Under Ompiach's command, a leadership council managed the group's affairs.

For a time, the [[Venithon Twins]] worked for this organization. Although they were officially under the council's orders, they held a great amount of power on some of the council members.

Ompiach sent the Venithon Twins to create a treaty between the Hy'thor pirate group and pirate [[Safonne Pendon]]. The meeting ended in a naval battle between both of them.
